steps.assistant_text: IDENTIFIED: fcos/__cosf (gu/cosf.c verbatim — the 0x70FCC+ region is the gu/ block, not osVi). Splat had split it into FOUR fragments (70FCC/710F8/71114/71130) — retiring 2 documented caps ('caller-set-$f2 double polynomial' = the n-odd tail; 'prologue-stolen-$at' = the return-zero tail). rodata P[5]/rpi/pihi/pilo/zero baked at gl_data 0x24E0..0x2523 via gl_ref syms. Also renamed 20 misattributed placeholder-callees (name-reuse collision trap).
